foundational_lock: THESIS proves, protects, captures, hashes, notarizes, and publishes.

protocols.latin: Protocolum Thesis: De Probatione, Tutela, Publicatione et Notariatu
protocols.canonical_line: THESIS proves, protects, captures, hashes, notarizes, and publishes.

protocols.latin: Protocolum Terminorum: De Superficie Stationis Nativae
Ratio Ordinis: De Substratis Neuralibus et Reticularibus
Protocolum Memoriae: De Linea et Consequentia
Protocolum Registri: De Signis, Schematibus et Tabulis Canonicis
Protocolum Validationis SVA: De Assertionibus et Evidentiis
Protocolum Experimentorum AUTE: De Probationibus et Tentaminibus
protocols.canonical_line: AUTE tests what THESIS cannot yet prove.
Public release does not mean open license.

protocols.latin: Protocolum Editionis Zenodo: De DOI, Praeprintis et Provenientia
protocols.canonical_line: Each paper gets its own DOI; each version keeps its lineage.
Reference stream connects the record to its lineage.
PRODUCTION- stages implementation without surrendering rights.

protocols.latin: Protocolum Diarii Medinae: De Articulis, Probationibus et Editione
protocols.canonical_line: Medina’s journal must be more disciplined than a blog.

protocols.latin: Specula Donorum: De Subventionibus et Aptitudine Medinae
protocols.canonical_line: THESIS must know which Medina systems can truthfully support the application.
The notary should record the root of the evidence graph, not only the final file bundle.
